title: Setting workload for each day during a task
excerpt: I’m using Monday.com to manage my personal schedules. Let’s say in the main table I created a task whose duration is April 1 - April 15. Then in the Calender of the dashboard there would be a bar representing the task th…

posts.author: KE10 (Renzhi KE)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using Monday.com to manage my personal schedules. Let’s say in the main table I created a task whose duration is April 1 - April 15. Then in the Calender of the dashboard there would be a bar representing the task that spans across April 1 - April 15 without presenting any further detail.

However, I want to specify the workload for each day during this task. For example, I may plan to work on the task for 2 hours on April 3, from 2pm to 4pm, and 3 hours on April 4, from 3pm to 6pm, and not work on it on April 5.

How to specify such details regarding the workload for each day during a task?

posts.author: alex.walton (Alex Walton)
posts.cookedHtml: I have not found a way to do this but I would also appreciate the ability to schedule the effort flexibly across the timeline within the workload view.
